claim: Ollama models default to 2048 token context window, which is too small for Bolt.new's system prompt, causing the model to lose context and fail to open web containers
actionable: When using Ollama models with Bolt-like tools, increase context window to 8K+ tokens using a Modelfile with 'parameter num_ctx' configuration
source_title: How to Use Bolt.new for FREE with Local LLMs (And NO Rate Limits)

claim: Creating an Ollama Modelfile with increased context (e.g., 32,768 tokens) allows reusing smaller models with better context handling for AI coding tools
actionable: Create custom Modelfile variants of your Ollama models with 'parameter num_ctx 32768' to enable them to work with context-heavy AI coding assistants
source_title: How to Use Bolt.new for FREE with Local LLMs (And NO Rate Limits)

claim: Deepseek Coder v2 (236B) costs ~14 cents per million input tokens and 28 cents per million output tokens - 20x cheaper than Claude and performs nearly as well
actionable: For cost-sensitive AI coding work, evaluate Deepseek Coder v2 on Open Router or their native API as a strong alternative to Claude or GPT-4
source_title: How to Use Bolt.new for FREE with Local LLMs (And NO Rate Limits)

claim: Starting with simple prompts and iteratively building complexity reduces hallucinations in AI coding - even small 7B models can execute this strategy effectively
actionable: When using smaller local LLMs with coding agents, start with minimal specs and gradually add design details rather than overloading with full requirements upfront
source_title: How to Use Bolt.new for FREE with Local LLMs (And NO Rate Limits)

claim: Quaen 2.5 Coder 7B can effectively build full chat applications including API integration and UI components when used with proper prompting strategy
actionable: For local LLM coding, try Quaen 2.5 Coder 7B as a strong open-source option that can handle web app development with iterative prompting
source_title: How to Use Bolt.new for FREE with Local LLMs (And NO Rate Limits)

claim: Specifying exact design details like colors, padding, and measurements in prompts helps agents design better UIs even when using smaller models
actionable: When prompting agents for UI work, include specific design parameters (colors, spacing, measurements) rather than relying on agents to make aesthetic choices
source_title: How to Use Bolt.new for FREE with Local LLMs (And NO Rate Limits)
